title: jasminum listeri
intro: Jasminum listeri, also known as the Himalayan jasmine or Lister's jasmine, is a fragrant, climbing shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Jasminum listeri include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antacid. The herbal preparations of Jasminum listeri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
